title: IP24 1QY, C & D Foods (Larkshall) Unlimited: environmental permit issued - EPR/AP3125SZ/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: C & D Foods (Larkshall) Unlimited Installation name: Larkshall Pet Food Site Permit number: EPR/AP3125SZ/A001  "
